'''''Voor Viper''''' was a modified [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] that was owned and operated by [[Tig Fromm]] approximately [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]]. The vessel was not in prime condition and was prone to malfunctioning. After the destruction of the ''[[Trigon One]]'', the ''Voor Viper '' attacked [[Kea Moll]]'s ''[[Sand Sloth]]'', but the [[Fromm Gang/Legends|Fromms]] were not able to capture the ship.
